hero.subtitle: A {{age}} energetic boy who loves cars, LEGO, reading, and sports!

about.title: About Me
about.name: Yibu Zhou
about.description: I'm Yibu Zhou, a lively little boy who loves exploring the world around me. I enjoy building with LEGO, reading interesting books, and staying active through sports.

cars.title: Toy Cars
cars.description: I love all kinds of toy cars! Racing cars, construction vehicles, emergency vehicles - you name it!

lego.title: LEGO Building
lego.description: I've built various LEGO City sets for ages 6 and under, including Ferrari racing cars. I love creating my own worlds!

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: My current favorite is the 'Who Would Win' series! It describes two animals and then they battle to see who wins. So exciting!

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: I love staying active! I could walk long distances since I was 2, won the 2km running race at age 3, and now I'm learning to ride a bike!

lego.title: LEGO Master Builder
lego.description: Completed various LEGO City sets including Ferrari racing cars

running.title: Running Champion
running.description: Won 1st place in the class 2km running race at age 3!

walking.title: Little Hiker
walking.description: Started hiking with mom and dad at age 2, already climbed several mountains!

cycling.title: Learning to Cycle
cycling.description: Currently learning to ride a bicycle with training wheels

works.title: My Works
works.subtitle: Check out my works!
works.placeholder: More exciting content coming soon, stay tuned!
